metadata.description: Fintegrity's Claude Cowork plugin marketplace — CFOaaS workflows, Swedish accounting conventions, and integrations against the Fintegrity Fabric data platform. Forked from anthropics/financial-services, scoped to verticals and agents that map to our actual practice.

plugins.name: financial-analysis
plugins.description: Core vertical. Modeling (comps, DCF, LBO, 3-statement), Excel audit, deck QC. Holds the shared MCP connectors that the other plugins draw on. Install first — every other plugin depends on this.

plugins.name: fund-admin
plugins.description: GL reconciliation, break tracing, accruals, roll-forwards, variance commentary, NAV tie-out. The bread-and-butter of CFOaaS — directly maps to our month-end and forensic P&L work (Sourcian, Modulai, Ciencia).

plugins.name: private-equity
plugins.description: Deal sourcing, due diligence checklists, IC memos, unit economics, returns analysis, portfolio KPI tracking. Used for buy-side advisory and exit-structuring work.

plugins.name: gl-reconciler
plugins.description: Named agent. Finds GL breaks, traces root cause, routes for sign-off. Direct fit for the Sourcian-style invoice-level P&L reconstruction work.

plugins.name: month-end-closer
plugins.description: Named agent. Runs accruals, roll-forwards, variance commentary at month-end. Built around continuous-close patterns.

plugins.name: statement-auditor
plugins.description: Named agent. Audits financial statements before they go out. Useful for QC on year-end and DD-context statements.

plugins.name: meeting-prep-agent
plugins.description: Named agent. Builds a briefing pack before client meetings — pulls recent activity, flags open items, drafts talking points.

plugins.name: valuation-reviewer
plugins.description: Named agent. Cross-checks valuation work against templates and peer data. Useful for DD valuation reviews and exit pricing.
